name: Rattlebone
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Roll the Bones
uniqueTraits.text: At the end of Rattlebone's activation, roll one die. If you roll a 1 or 2, you may remove a boon or blight from a model within that many hexes of Rattlebone and place it on a different model within that many hexes.

ultimate.name: Power Hex
ultimate.text: Choose one blight for each Hexling within range. Each enemy champion within range gains those blights.

plotSkills.name: Call Totems
plotSkills.text: Remove any number of Hexlings from the battlefield. Then place them on hexes within 2 hexes of Rattlebone.

clashSkills.name: Cursed Ground
clashSkills.text: Place up to two objective hexes on empty non-objective hexes within range. Remove them at the end of the clash phase.

traits.name: Hex Eaters
traits.text: When Rattlebone rolls a blank on her Roll the Bones roll, the Hexlings may gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Attune Magic
plotSkills.text: Gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Hex Bolt
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.

clashSkills.name: Purge Magic
clashSkills.text: Move all boons and blights from the Hexlings to a friendly model within range.

clashSkills.name: Hex Bolt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.
